Company tags are now assigned based on a realistic fit between the topic and the company, rather than trying to force a balanced count across companies.

The current monitoring plan computes PSI weekly for key numerical and categorical features, replacing the obsolete monthly‑accuracy‑only plan.
The old monitoring plan measured only model accuracy, doing so once per month.
PSI was added to monitor feature drift so the team can detect changes in feature distributions early and trigger retraining before accuracy degrades.
Retraining should be triggered when the PSI crosses the alert threshold for two consecutive checks.
The v0 dashboard should display the drift status, the time of the last check, and whether retraining is recommended.
